input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.4.1
            TITLE: the presentation concept may require information to be submitted prior to the event.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.4.1: The Presentation Concept may require information to be submitted prior to the event.
S.2.4.1 The Presentation Concept may require information to be submitted prior to the event.  
Specific details will be included in the Presentation Concept.

final_answer: rule S.2.4.1: The Presentation Concept may require information to be submitted prior to the event. Specific details will be included in the Presentation Concept.
